# Fauzi Cihuyy - Desktop Developer

## Site Description
Personal portfolio and CV website for Fauzi Cihuyy, a Desktop Developer from Indonesia specializing in Microsoft Access, VBA, SQL Server, and system integration for business applications.

## Domain
https://fauzicihuyy.web.id

## Key Pages

### index.html (Landing Page)
Main landing page showcasing:
- Hero section with introduction
- About section with experience and tech stack
- Portfolio section with 4 featured projects (Petshop, POS, Konveksi, Pesantren)
- FAQ section with common questions
- Call-to-action section

### cv.html (Curriculum Vitae)
Professional CV page containing:
- Personal information
- Contact details (email, WhatsApp, LinkedIn)
- Work experience
- Education
- Technical skills
- Download PDF functionality

## Services

### Desktop Application Development
- Microsoft Access database applications
- VBA programming
- SQL Server integration
- RDP Server setup and management
- System integration

### Industry Specializations
- Petshop management systems
- Point of Sales (POS) systems
- Production management (Konveksi/Garment)
- Financial management (Pesantren/Islamic boarding schools)

## Contact Information
- Email: fauzithea3@gmail.com
- WhatsApp: +62 882-1800-1749
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/fauzicihuyy/

## Experience
- 8+ years in desktop application development
- 50+ completed projects
- Specialized in business efficiency systems

## Tech Stack
- Microsoft Access
- VBA (Visual Basic for Applications)
- SQL Server
- RDP Server
- System Integration

## Language
Primary: Indonesian (Bahasa Indonesia)
Secondary: English

## Target Audience
Business owners in Indonesia looking for desktop application solutions to improve operational efficiency.
